sentences.arabic: كَانَ النَّهْرُ الْكَبِيرُ مَشْهُورًا فِي التَّارِيخِ الْقَدِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Velika rijeka bila je čuvena u drevnoj historiji.
sentences.translationEn: The great river was famous in ancient history.

sentences.arabic: عَاشَ النَّاسُ عَلَى ضِفَافِهِ وَزَرَعُوا الْأَرْضَ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi su živjeli na njenim obalama i obrađivali zemlju.
sentences.translationEn: People lived on its banks and cultivated the land.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ مَاءُ النَّهْرِ يَسْقِي الْحُقُولَ وَالْحَدَائِقَ.
sentences.translation: Voda rijeke natapala je polja i vrtove.
sentences.translationEn: The river water irrigated the fields and gardens.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ النَّهْرُ يُعْطِي الْحَيَاةَ لِكُلِّ مَنْ حَوْلَهُ.
sentences.translation: Rijeka je davala život svima oko nje.
sentences.translationEn: The river gave life to all those around it.
